descriptions.text: Welcome to the world of "The Shapeshifter 2 - Become the Animal You Touch" by Green Boy Games, the second part of the trilogy that has taken the Game Boy community by storm! In this unique and original Old-School Adventure game, you'll join Elliot on a mission to save the Elven world from the wizard's spell. Armed with a great power to become any animal he touches, Elliot must race against time as the powers run out at dawn.
